testcase.name: emits account lifecycle events
always switches to newly created accounts
account plugin refreshes providers on account lifecycle events
starts without agents
materializes replayable agent transforms
rebuilds state when a transform is replaced
removes a transform contribution when its scope closes
applies direct agent updates
creates agents with runtime defaults and supports direct removal
normalizes provider baseURL into endpoint url
normalizes model baseURL into endpoint url
resolves unknown model endpoint from provider endpoint
runs catalog transform hooks after baseURL is normalized
runs catalog transform when a plugin is added
ignores plugin additions from another location
resolves provider and model option merges
falls back to newest available model when no default is configured
uses a transform-provided default model until that transform is replaced
small model prefers small keyword candidates before cost scoring
removes providers denied by policy after loading
declared schema has no ungenerated migrations
applies tracked migrations to an empty database
runs session usage backfill in order with schema changes
imports existing drizzle migration state
skips drizzle import when migration table already has state
publishes events with the current location
omits location when no location is available
publishes definition version
stores definitions in the exported registry
keeps the latest sync definition in the registry
publishes to typed and wildcard subscriptions
runs projectors inline
runs projectors before publishing to streams
runs listeners inline after projectors
inserts sync event rows on publish
increments sync event seq per aggregate
uses custom sync aggregate field
replays sync events through projectors
replay inserts external event rows
replay defects on sequence mismatch
replay defects on unknown event type
replayAll validates contiguous aggregate events
replayAll accepts later chunks after the first batch
claim fences replay owners
replay with owner claims an unowned sequence
replay from a different owner leaves claimed sequence unchanged
claim updates the event sequence owner
remove clears sync event sequence
tmp path is under the system temp directory
tmp path is created on module load
isolates location state while sharing location policy with catalog
resolves the current project and vcs information
accepts a model selection without a variant
preserves an explicit model variant
get() returns providers from disk when cache file exists
get() returns empty catalog when disk empty, fetch disabled, and no bundled snapshot is injected
get() is single-flight under concurrent calls
get() caches across calls (later disk writes are ignored until invalidate)
refresh(true) fetches via HttpClient and updates the cache
refresh(false) skips fetch when on-disk file is fresh
refresh(false) fetches when on-disk file is stale
refresh swallows HTTP errors and leaves cache intact
reads registry from project .npmrc
reads scoped registries from project .npmrc
flattens boolean and list options
normalizes configured registry without trailing slash
leaves configured registry without trailing slash unchanged
keeps normal scoped package specs unchanged
handles git https specs
reifies when package cache directory exists without the package installed
respects omit from project .npmrc
returns the caller's fallback when no statement matches
evaluates wildcard provider rules in written order
matches action and resource independently
uses the last matching loaded statement
returns global for non-git directory
returns git global for repo with no commits and no remote
falls back to root commit when origin is missing
prefers normalized origin over root commit
normalizes ssh and https remotes to the same id
ignores file remotes and falls back to root commit
returns previous cached id from common dir
does not write the cache while resolving
resolves from nested directories to repo root
linked worktree returns opened worktree directory and previous from common dir
applies global permissions between built-in and agent-specific permissions
maps configured agent fields and preserves an unspecified model variant
removes a built-in agent disabled by configuration
returns an empty configuration when directory files do not exist
loads JSON and JSONC files from lowest to highest priority
accepts $schema metadata without writing it into config files
loads supported scalar and resource configuration
ignores invalid files while loading valid config values
loads policy statements in reverse config order
loads global, ancestor, and .opencode configuration up to the project boundary
loads configured providers and applies later model overrides
captures stdout
captures multiple lines
returns exit code
returns non-zero exit code
uses cwd when spawning commands
fails for invalid cwd
passes environment variables with extendEnv
passes multiple environment variables
captures stderr output
captures both stdout and stderr
captures stdout via .all when no stderr
captures stderr via .all when no stdout
allows providing standard input to a command
kills a running process
kills a child when scope exits
forceKillAfter escalates for stubborn processes
isRunning reflects process state
fails for invalid command
pipes stdout of one command to stdin of another
three-stage pipeline
pipes stderr with { from: 'stderr' }
pipes combined output with { from: 'all' }
uses shell routing on Windows
runs cmd scripts with spaces on Windows without shell
parses and decodes OTEL resource attributes
drops OTEL resource attributes when any entry is invalid
keeps built-in attributes when env values conflict
returns true for directories
returns false for files
returns false for non-existent paths
returns true for files
returns false for directories
returns file contents when file exists
returns undefined for missing file (NotFound)
round-trips JSON data
creates nested directories
is idempotent
creates parent directories if missing
writes directly when parent exists
writes Uint8Array content
finds target in start directory
finds target in parent directories
returns empty array when not found
finds multiple targets walking up
finds files matching pattern
supports absolute paths
matches patterns
finds files walking up directories
exists works
remove works
mimeType returns correct types
contains checks path containment
overlaps detects overlapping paths
should convert system message content to string
should convert messages with only a text part to a string content
should convert messages with image parts
should convert messages with image parts from Uint8Array
should handle URL-based images
should handle multiple text parts without flattening
should convert assistant text messages
should handle assistant message with null content when only tool calls
should concatenate multiple text parts
should stringify arguments to tool calls
should handle text output type in tool results
should handle multiple tool results as separate messages
should handle text plus multiple tool calls
should omit reasoning_text without reasoning_opaque
should include reasoning_opaque from providerOptions
should include reasoning_opaque from text part providerOptions
should handle reasoning-only assistant message
should convert a multi-turn conversation with reasoning
should stream text deltas
should stream reasoning with tool calls and capture reasoning_opaque
should handle reasoning_opaque that comes at end with text in between
should handle reasoning_opaque and content in the same chunk
should handle reasoning_opaque and content followed by tool calls
should emit reasoning-end before tool-input-start when reasoning goes directly to tool calls
should attach reasoning_opaque to tool calls without reasoning_text
should include response metadata from first chunk
should emit stream-start with warnings
should include raw chunks when requested
should send tools in OpenAI format
creates an Alibaba SDK for @ai-sdk/alibaba
ignores non-Alibaba SDK packages
matches the old bundled Alibaba SDK provider naming
uses the old default languageModel(apiID) behavior
moves endpoint option to endpoint URL
prefers endpoint over baseURL for SDK base URL
uses baseURL as SDK base URL
creates SDK without explicit credential env so the default AWS chain can resolve credentials
uses config region over AWS_REGION for SDK base URL
uses AWS_REGION for SDK base URL when config region is absent
defaults SDK region to us-east-1
loads bearer token option into env and uses bearer auth
prefers bearer token env over bearer token option
uses SigV4 credential env when bearer token is absent
applies legacy cross-region inference prefixes
uses AWS_REGION for language prefixes when region option is absent
applies the full legacy cross-region prefix matrix
ignores non-Bedrock providers for language selection
applies legacy beta headers
ignores non-Anthropic providers
creates Anthropic SDKs with the model provider ID as the SDK name
uses the Anthropic provider ID as the SDK name for the bundled Anthropic provider
maps the resource env var to the Azure SDK baseURL
leaves baseURL unset without resource env and ignores other providers
selects chat only for completion URLs
uses the legacy Azure selector order and provider guard
falls back from responses to messages, chat, then languageModel
resolves resourceName from env
keeps explicit resourceName over env and ignores other providers
prefers account resourceName over env
falls back to env when configured resourceName is blank
falls back to env when configured resourceName is whitespace
allows configured baseURL without resourceName
rejects missing resourceName when baseURL is not configured
selects chat only for completion URLs
selects chat from per-call useCompletionUrls
ignores model useCompletionUrls when per-call option is unset
uses the legacy Azure selector order and provider guard
falls back through the legacy Azure selector order
applies the legacy integration header
ignores non-Cerebras providers
creates a bundled Cerebras SDK with the model provider ID as the SDK name
preserves an explicit bundled Cerebras SDK name option
ignores non-Cerebras SDK packages
requires account, gateway, and token before creating the unified SDK
passes legacy metadata, cache, log, and User-Agent values under the AI Gateway options key
parses legacy cf-aig-metadata header when metadata option is absent
prefers Cloudflare env values over auth/config-derived options
accepts gatewayId metadata copied from auth into provider options
falls back to CF_AIG_TOKEN when CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is unset
does not create an SDK when account and gateway IDs are missing
does not create an SDK when the token is missing
does not replace a configured baseURL with the Cloudflare AI Gateway SDK
maps provider/model IDs through the unified Cloudflare provider unchanged
ignores non Cloudflare AI Gateway packages
maps account ID to endpoint URL and creates an OpenAI-compatible SDK
preserves a configured endpoint URL instead of deriving one from account ID
allows a configured baseURL without account ID
falls back to account metadata when account env is absent
uses env account ID over configured account ID
uses env API key over auth or configured API key and keeps the Cloudflare User-Agent
expands account ID vars in endpoint URLs
selects languageModel with the API model ID
does not create an SDK for non OpenAI-compatible packages
creates a Cohere SDK only for @ai-sdk/cohere
uses the model provider ID as the bundled SDK name
leaves language selection to the default languageModel fallback
creates a DeepInfra SDK for @ai-sdk/deepinfra
passes the model provider ID as the bundled DeepInfra SDK name
uses the canonical provider ID as the bundled DeepInfra SDK name
matches only the exact bundled DeepInfra package
uses the default languageModel selection for DeepInfra models
creates an SDK from a provider factory export
does not override an SDK already supplied by an earlier plugin
injects the provider ID as the SDK factory name
loads npm packages through their resolved import entrypoint
wraps missing npm entrypoint failures as AISDK init errors
wraps dynamic import failures as AISDK init errors
wraps missing provider factory exports as AISDK init errors
uses the model apiID for the default language model
creates a Gateway SDK for @ai-sdk/gateway
passes the model providerID as the Gateway SDK name
matches Vercel AI Gateway models by their @ai-sdk/gateway package
creates the bundled Copilot SDK for the GitHub Copilot package
selects languageModel when responses and chat are absent
selects languageModel with the API model ID when responses and chat are absent
uses responses for gpt-5 models except gpt-5-mini
uses the API model ID when selecting responses or chat
disables gpt-5-chat-latest before Copilot language selection
does not disable gpt-5-chat-latest for non-Copilot providers
ignores non-Copilot providers
creates SDKs with legacy default instance URL, token env, headers, and feature flags
uses GITLAB_INSTANCE_URL when instanceUrl is not configured
keeps configured instance URL, apiKey, aiGatewayHeaders, and featureFlags over env/defaults
ignores non-GitLab SDK packages
uses active account API token over GITLAB_TOKEN
uses active account OAuth access token when no API token exists
uses workflowChat for duo workflow models and preserves selectedModelRef
uses exact static workflow model ids when the provider recognizes them
uses provider feature flags instead of request feature flags
uses agenticChat with provider aiGatewayHeaders and feature flags for normal models
resolves legacy project and location env on provider update
keeps configured project and location over env fallback
creates SDKs from legacy env fallback and default location
uses GOOGLE_CLOUD_LOCATION before VERTEX_LOCATION when creating SDKs
creates SDKs for google-vertex Anthropic models with multi-region endpoints
keeps configured baseURL for google-vertex Anthropic models
selects google-vertex Anthropic language models through V2 plugins
trims model IDs before selecting language models
ignores non Vertex Anthropic providers for language selection
resolves project and location from env using legacy precedence
resolves the advertised GOOGLE_VERTEX_PROJECT env for provider updates and SDKs
keeps configured project and location over env and uses global endpoint
keeps OpenAI-compatible Vertex endpoint templates regional for eu
defaults location to us-central1 when only project is configured
does not pass Google auth fetch to the native Vertex SDK
keeps Google auth fetch for OpenAI-compatible Vertex endpoints
trims model IDs before selecting language models
creates a Google Generative AI SDK for @ai-sdk/google using the provider ID as SDK name
ignores non-Google SDK packages
uses default languageModel loading with provider ID parity
creates a Groq SDK for @ai-sdk/groq
ignores non-Groq SDK packages
only matches the bundled @ai-sdk/groq package exactly
matches the old bundled Groq SDK provider naming
uses the default languageModel(apiID) behavior
is registered so legacy referer headers can be applied
applies legacy referer headers only to kilo
uses the exact legacy Kilo header casing and set
uses the legacy provider-id guard instead of endpoint package matching
is registered so legacy referer headers can be applied
applies legacy referer headers only to enabled llmgateway
does not apply legacy headers to a disabled llmgateway provider
creates a Mistral SDK for @ai-sdk/mistral
ignores non-Mistral SDK packages
matches the old bundled Mistral SDK provider name for the bundled provider ID
matches the old bundled Mistral SDK provider name for custom provider IDs
leaves Mistral language selection on the default sdk.languageModel(apiID) path
is registered so legacy referer headers can be applied
applies NVIDIA tracking headers only to nvidia
adds billing origin for custom NVIDIA endpoints
preserves an explicit NVIDIA billing origin header
preserves explicit includeUsage false and defaults it to true
defaults includeUsage for OpenAI-compatible package matches
uses the provider ID as the OpenAI-compatible provider name
does not overwrite an SDK created by an earlier provider-specific plugin
creates an OpenAI SDK for @ai-sdk/openai using the provider ID as SDK name
ignores non-OpenAI SDK packages
uses the Responses API for language models
ignores non-OpenAI providers
disables gpt-5-chat-latest during catalog transforms
does not disable gpt-5-chat-latest for non-OpenAI providers
uses a public key and disables paid models without credentials
keeps free models without credentials
treats output-only cost as free without credentials
uses OPENCODE_API_KEY as credentials
uses configured provider env vars as credentials
uses configured apiKey as credentials
uses auth-enabled providers as credentials
ignores non-opencode providers and models
prefers gpt-5-nano as the opencode small model
is registered so legacy OpenRouter behavior can be applied
applies legacy referer headers only to openrouter
creates an SDK only for the OpenRouter package
filters OpenRouter's gpt-5 chat alias
does not disable gpt-5-chat-latest for non-OpenRouter providers
creates a Perplexity SDK for the exact @ai-sdk/perplexity package
ignores packages that are not the bundled Perplexity package
uses the Perplexity provider ID as the SDK name for the bundled provider
creates bundled Perplexity SDKs for custom provider IDs
leaves Perplexity language selection to the default languageModel fallback
copies serviceKey option into AICORE_SERVICE_KEY but keeps SDK options to deployment metadata
preserves existing AICORE_SERVICE_KEY over serviceKey option
omits deployment and resourceGroup SDK options when no service key is available
uses the callable SDK for language selection
ignores non-SAP AI Core providers
creates a TogetherAI SDK for @ai-sdk/togetherai
matches the old bundled provider package exactly
creates bundled TogetherAI SDKs for custom provider IDs
defaults language selection to sdk.languageModel with the model API ID
creates a Venice SDK for venice-ai-sdk-provider
uses the model provider ID as the bundled Venice SDK name
only handles the bundled venice-ai-sdk-provider package
leaves Venice language selection to the default languageModel fallback
applies legacy lower-case referer headers
does not add legacy upper-case referer headers
creates @ai-sdk/vercel SDKs for custom provider IDs
ignores non-Vercel providers
creates an xAI SDK only for @ai-sdk/xai
creates xAI SDKs for custom provider IDs
uses responses with the model apiID for xAI language models
ignores non-xAI providers
is registered so legacy referer headers can be applied
applies the exact legacy Zenmux headers
merges legacy Zenmux headers with existing headers
lets configured Zenmux legacy headers override defaults
guards legacy Zenmux headers to the exact zenmux provider id
captures stdout and exit code zero
non-zero exit returns RunResult; caller can require success
requireSuccess fails on non-zero exit
requireSuccess succeeds on exit 0
requireExitIn allowlists multiple exit codes
truncates stdout when maxOutputBytes is set
truncates stderr when maxErrorBytes is set
result includes command description
string returns stdout as string
lines returns the platform's array of lines
feeds a string to stdin and returns it on stdout
feeds a Uint8Array to stdin
feeds a Stream of Uint8Array chunks to stdin
completes correctly with empty input
carries existing Command options like env
carries existing Command options like cwd
emits lines incrementally and ends cleanly on exit 0
okExitCodes determines whether a non-zero exit fails the stream
without okExitCodes, never fails on exit code
AbortSignal interrupts the stream
returns the platform ChildProcessHandle for advanced use
acquire and release via scoped Effect
withLock data-first
withLock pipeable
writes owner metadata
breaks stale lock dirs
recovers from stale breaker
detects compromise when lock dir removed
detects token mismatch
fails on unwritable lock roots
enforces mutual exclusion under process contention
recovers after a crashed lock owner
enforces mutual exclusion under process contention
times out while waiting when lock is still healthy
recovers after a crashed lock owner
breaks stale lock dirs when heartbeat is missing
recovers when a stale breaker claim was left behind
fails clearly if lock dir is removed while held
writes owner metadata while lock is held
supports acquire with await using
refuses token mismatch release and recovers from stale
fails clearly on unwritable lock roots
